_notes: Declarative routing rules for UpCommander. Hot-reloaded by orchestrator without app restart. Update this file as benchmark results improve.

k2.description: Sonnet 4.6 + Karpathy CLAUDE.md + verified CONTRACT.md. Best cost/quality ratio at $0.08/run (53/60 avg quality). Benchmark V3 winner.

pipeline.description: Opus 4.7 generates CONTRACT → cheap model implements → Sonnet 4.6 reviews. Higher quality ceiling, ~5x cost. Use for high-stakes tasks.

sonnet_raw.description: Sonnet 4.6 with no scaffolding. Baseline. Use only for trivial single-file tasks.

opus_raw.description: Opus 4.7 with no scaffolding. Best for deep architecture review or greenfield design. High cost.

routing_rules.note: Single-file bug fixes: K2 is cost-optimal
Refactor 3+ files: K2 with L1 index to locate affected modules
Architecture review: Opus for depth, no scaffolding needed
High-stakes or expensive tasks: 3-tier pipeline for verified quality

index_strategy.description: Which codebase index level to feed each agent role
